title: Crop Progress Bar
description: Adds progress bar above all crops.
body:
# 🌱 Crop Progress Bar

## Description

Enhance your farming experience with the **Crop Progress Bar** mod. This mod adds a subtle, real-time progress bar above all crops, indicating their growth stage. It's designed to help players efficiently manage their farms without cluttering the screen.

## Required mods

For **Fabric** versions of the mod, [Cloth Config API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cloth-config) is required.  
For **Forge/NeoForge** versions of the mod, [MidnightLib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/midnightlib) is required.

## Features

*   Displays a growth progress bar above each crop.
*   Compatible with all vanilla crops.
*   Minimalistic and non-intrusive design.
*   Hide bar when crop is fully grown
*   Show crop bar only above the crop you are looking at
